name: HCM III ACQUISITION CORP.
business: We are a blank check company incorporated on April 15, 2025 as a Cayman Islands exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. We have not selected any business combination target and we have not, nor has anyone on our behalf, initiated any substantive discussions, directly or indirectly, with any business combination target. The Company will not generate any operating revenues until after the completion of its initial business combination, at the earliest.
